name: LazyMC - Double Ender Chest 1.21.1 Fabric
description: Every player's ender chest has 54 slots (6 rows) instead of vanilla's 27 (3 rows) - same inventory everyone already has, just twice the size. Two mixins: EnderChestInventory's backing size, and the ender chest's screen handler (createGeneric9x3 -> createGeneric9x6).
